templates.title: Summarize a project
templates.description: Generate a concise project summary (purpose, stack, state, recent direction) and save it to your knowledge base.

templates.title: Run daily digest
templates.description: Scan every project for recent activity (commits, PRs, issues) and write a digest to your knowledge base.

templates.title: Publish a local folder
templates.description: Take a folder on this machine, create a private GitHub repo, and push it.

templates.title: Search the knowledge base
templates.description: Find notes, digests, and summaries across your second brain.

templates.title: Capture a fleeting note
templates.description: Drop a quick thought into your inbox to process later.

templates.title: Browse my knowledge base
templates.description: Open the file tree of your Obsidian vault.

templates.title: Anything else (ad-hoc task)
templates.description: Describe a task in plain English. Clawbot plans steps using its primitive tools (vault search/read/write, GitHub fetch, local LLM) and executes them. Successful runs auto-save as reusable templates.

inputs.name: task
inputs.label: Task description
inputs.placeholder: e.g. Find every note that mentions Cognify and write a one-page roll-up to 0-Inbox/cognify-rollup.md

inputs.name: save_as_template
inputs.label: Save successful plan as a template

templates.title: Sync downloads to vault
templates.description: Mirror new files from your Downloads folder into the vault. Source files are never moved or deleted — clawbot only copies.

templates.title: Fetch and summarize the fetched content in one sentence.
templates.description: Saved from chat: "go fetch https://example.com and write a single sentence describing what is on that page"

templates.title: Fetch and summarize the provided URL
templates.description: Saved from chat: "go fetch https://example.com and write one short sentence about its content"

templates.title: Find out what Claude opus 4.7 was released for.
templates.description: Saved from chat: "research what claude opus 4.7 was released for"

templates.title: summarize what my vault knows about cognify
templates.description: Saved from chat: "summarize what my vault knows about cognify"

templates.title: Render https://example.com in a real browser, extract its main content.
templates.description: Saved from chat: "render https://example.com with a real browser and tell me what the page says"

templates.title: Multi-perspective investigation into the judiciary authority in Zimbabwe.
templates.description: Saved from chat: "do some research on the judiciary authority of zimbabwe"

templates.title: Deep research to find recent advancements in AI.
templates.description: Saved from chat: "do some research on top ai developments in the last 3 months and give me a report"

templates.title: Daily focus
templates.description: What should I focus on today? Looks at recent jobs in your vault, open threads, and notes flagged for follow-up.

templates.title: Weekly vault review
templates.description: Goes through the past week of vault changes, identifies what to promote from 0-Inbox/, what to archive, and any cross-references worth making.

templates.title: Find related notes
templates.description: Given a topic, finds related notes in your vault and explains the connection. Use to surface threads you forgot you had.

templates.title: Capture and connect
templates.description: Captures a new thought as a note and auto-links it to existing related notes in your vault.

templates.title: Quick web look-up
templates.description: Fast factual web search with citations. Use for single questions you don't want to clutter the vault with.

templates.title: Web investigation (multi-perspective)
templates.description: Full multi-perspective web investigation — parallel sub-agents query the web from mainstream, critical, practitioner, and recent angles, then synthesise a cited report.

templates.title: Latest news scan (web-only)
templates.description: Tight scan of the last 6-12 months on a topic using ONLY the 'recent' framing. Web-first, no synthesis of older context.

templates.title: Compare two on the web
templates.description: Side-by-side web investigation of two approaches/tools/companies/positions. Parallel sub-agents per side, then a comparison synth.

templates.title: Fact-check a claim
templates.description: Targeted web search for a specific claim. Pulls supporting AND opposing evidence in parallel, then states whether the claim holds, partially holds, or doesn't.

templates.title: Find primary sources
templates.description: Hunt for the ORIGINAL sources behind a topic — official docs, papers, press releases, primary datasets — rather than secondary commentary.

templates.title: Topic landscape map
templates.description: Build a map of a topic: key players, terminology, recent developments, open debates. Wide web sweep, structured output.

templates.title: Vault + web bridge
templates.description: Reads what your vault already knows about a topic, identifies the gaps, then uses the live web to fill ONLY those gaps. Captures the bridge as a permanent zettel.

templates.title: Draft a reply to a customer
templates.description: Read the customer's message, identify the real need, draft a reply that resolves it.

templates.title: Health-check a customer account
templates.description: Read the recent thread + usage signals and produce a customer health summary.

templates.title: Renewal preparation memo
templates.description: Build the renewal case from the account's history — wins, issues, expansion path.

templates.title: Onboarding plan for a new customer
templates.description: Personalised onboarding plan grounded in the customer's stated goals + segment.

templates.title: Turn a goal into an action plan
templates.description: Convert an ambiguous goal into a numbered plan — each step with owner, by-when, and done-means.

templates.title: Write a runbook
templates.description: Produce a runbook for a recurring operation — trigger, preconditions, numbered steps, verification, rollback.

templates.title: Weekly schedule from priorities
templates.description: Take a list of priorities and produce a dated weekly schedule with realistic blocks.

templates.title: Status report
templates.description: Write a clean status report — done, in-progress, blocked, next.

templates.title: Investigate + fix a bug
templates.description: Read the relevant code, identify root cause, propose the smallest correct fix with a test plan.

templates.title: Code review on a diff/PR
templates.description: Senior-engineer review of a diff or PR — correctness, maintainability, security, performance.

templates.title: Architecture trade-off memo
templates.description: Compare two technical approaches for a real decision. Names trade-offs honestly, picks one.

templates.title: Repo orientation
templates.description: Read a repo and produce a senior-engineer orientation: what it does, how it's organised, where to start.

templates.title: Positioning sprint
templates.description: Take a product or feature and produce a positioning statement, target segment, and three message variants for testing.

templates.title: Campaign brief
templates.description: Turn a goal into a campaign brief — audience, hook, channels, assets needed, success metric, dates.

templates.title: Landing page copy
templates.description: Customer-led landing page copy — hero, three value blocks, primary CTA, plus a second variant.

templates.title: Email sequence (3-step)
templates.description: Three-email sequence for a campaign — each email named, with subject, hook, body and CTA.

templates.title: Copy critique
templates.description: Critique existing marketing copy — what's vague, what's audience-mismatched, what to cut. Returns a rewrite.

templates.title: Scan the web for recent developments in AI in agriculture, cite sources [N], and note changes compared to earlier consensus.
templates.description:
Saved from chat: "Use research.multiperspective with perspectives='recent' to scan the live web for developments in the last 6-12 months on the following topic. Prefer news, blogs, releases, official announcements. Cite every claim with [N]. Note what changed compared to earlier consensus and flag what's still unconfirmed.

Topic: ai in agriculture"

templates.title: Search for any previous mentions of a ZBC letter in the user's vault.
templates.description: Saved from chat: "whats in the ZBC letter"

templates.title:
Default research plan for: Fact-check the following claim against the live web. Run TWO parallel web searches: one for supporting evidence (the claim phrased as fact), one for opposing evidence (the claim negated or with words like 'debunk', 'false', 'no evidence'). Fetch top sources from both. Report: VERDICT (supported / partially supported / contested / unsupported), key evidence with [N] citations on both sides, and the strongest counter-argument you found.

Topic: what is the hanta virus
templates.description:
Saved from chat: "Fact-check the following claim against the live web. Run TWO parallel web searches: one for supporting evidence (the claim phrased as fact), one for opposing evidence (the claim negated or with words like 'debunk', 'false', 'no evidence'). Fetch top sources from both. Report: VERDICT (supported / partially supported / contested / unsupported), key evidence with [N] citations on both sides, and the strongest counter-argument you found.

Topic: what is the hanta virus?"

templates.title:
Default research plan for: (You are operating as Researcher, the Investigative analyst. Bias tool choices, output shape, and depth toward this role's conventions.)

Recent conversation (chronological):
  User: "draft a marketing brief for our Q4 launch"
  You (assistant): "On it. Here is your Q4 launch brief: ..."

Current request (treat as a continuation of the conversation above unless it clearly opens a new topic — resolve any implicit references like "it", "that", "the previous one", "make it shorter" against the recent turns): make it shorter and add a metric
templates.description:
Saved from chat: "(You are operating as Researcher, the Investigative analyst. Bias tool choices, output shape, and depth toward this role's conventions.)

Recent conversation (chronological):
  User: "draft a marketing brief for our Q4 launch"
  You (assistant): "On it. Here is your Q4 launch brief: ..."

Current request (treat as a continuation of the conversation above unless it clearly opens a new topic — resolve any implicit references like "it", "that", "the previous one", "make it shorter" against the recent turns): make it shorter and add a metric"

templates.title: Conduct deep web research on LK‑99 and capture a one‑paragraph summary to 0‑Inbox/.
templates.description:
Saved from chat: "(You are operating as Clawbot, the AI agent operator. Bias tool choices, output shape, and depth toward this role's conventions.)

research the latest news on the LK-99 superconductor claim and save a one-paragraph summary to my vault

Interpretation: intent=research, target="the latest news on the LK-99 superconductor claim and save a one-paragraph summary to my vault"."
